title: Gauntlet 2
popupHtml:
Gauntlet 2

**Prerequisite:** Choose the Subtle Approach to The Big Score. **Gold Medal Requirements:** - Mapped - Deliver the Gauntlet pictured in the email - Not a Scratch - Deliver the Gauntlet with no damage - Pimped Out - Spend $17000 modifying the Gauntlet **Next Mission:** [Gauntlet 3](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13081)

title: Gauntlet 3
popupHtml:
Gauntlet 3

**Prerequisite:** Choose the Subtle Approach to The Big Score. **Gold Medal Requirements:** - Mapped - Deliver the Gauntlet pictured in the email - Not a Scratch - Deliver the Gauntlet with no damage - Pimped Out - Spend $17000 modifying the Gauntlet **Next Mission:** [The Big Score](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=471611)

title: Taxi Mission #1
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #1

Pick your passenger up at the entrance of the medical center. He enjoys an adrenaline rush so feel free to drive like a maniac (without crashing!).

title: Taxi Mission #2
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #2

Your second passenger is located near Up-n-Atom Burger. He's feeling a bit ill so make sure you drive carefully!

title: Taxi Mission #3
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #3

Your third passenger is waiting near the 24/7 Supermarket. He needs to get to Vinewood and he needs to get there fast. Forget about traditional routes in order to get a **Speed Bonus.**

title: Taxi Mission #4
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #4

Your fourth passenger waits outside the Ammu-Nation store. Make sure you're **armed** for this one!

title: Taxi Mission #5
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #5

Your fifth passenger is waiting in the parking lot of Galileo Park. She needs to be taken to the best tailor in town. You know which one to pick, right?

title: Taxi Mission #7
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #7

Your seventh passenger is waiting near the Flagpole. Take him to his girl on Elgin Avenue.

title: Taxi Mission #8
popupHtml:
Taxi Mission #8

Your eighth passenger waits at the **Richman Hotel.** You'll need a 4-seater for this one.
